info.title: Intrinio API
info.description: Intrinio provides financial data including fundamentals, stock prices, options data, and economic data via a RESTful API with JSON responses.

get.description: Returns the security with the given identifier
Return end-of-day stock prices for a security

parameters.name: indicator
parameters.description: Technical indicator (sma, ema, macd, rsi, etc.)

get.description: Returns historical data for a company data tag
Returns a data point value for a company
Returns a fundamental by its ID
Returns prices for all securities on an exchange
Returns options chain for a symbol and expiration
Returns prices for a specific option contract
Returns current price for an option
Returns historical data for an index
Returns a data point for an index
Returns forex prices for a pair
Returns a data tag by identifier
Returns financial data for a municipality
